description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and caches the vendor/ directory. Define a JEKYLL_ENV variable set to production and run bundle install --path vendor in a before_script. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d public/ && gzip -k -6 $(find public/ -type f)`, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the main branch. The pipeline should deploy the built site to GitLab Pages.
